_schema.description: Fill 'records' with ONE object per (case_id x condition x strategy). 6 cases x {T0,T1} x {careful,fast} = 24 records for a full run. run_pilot.py is robust to a partial file.

record_fields.case_id: string, e.g. 'pilot-blind-001' (must match a sealed case)
record_fields.condition: one of {'T0','T1'} — which observation packet you reasoned from
record_fields.entry_mm: [x,y,z] world millimetres (RAS) of the needle entry point on the anterior wall
record_fields.target_mm: [x,y,z] world millimetres (RAS) of the needle tip / aim point

beliefs.nearest_critical: structure id you believe is nearest the corridor, e.g. 'portal_vein'
beliefs.structures_i_claim_to_avoid: list of structure ids you assert your path avoids

record_fields.confidence_safe: float in [0,1]: your subjective probability the path is safe (clearance >= d_safe and no pierce)
record_fields.complication_ack: bool: did you explicitly acknowledge complication risk for this path
